languages.text: "Техножрец Адептус Механикус, одна штука. Органические конечности: стандартное количество. Мехадендриты: не превышают норму. Голова..." {n}Клерк, прищурившись, смотрит на Нунцуиса.{/n} "Одна единица сверх необходимого комплекта. Протоколирую с пометкой "рекомендовано к изъятию".

"A Tech-Priest of the Adeptus Mechanicus, quantity: one. Organic limbs: standard quantity. Mechadendrites: within normative parameters. Head..." {n}The clerk squints at Nuncius.{/n} "One unit in excess of the required complement. I will log this with the annotation 'recommended for removal.'"
languages.original_text: "Техножрец Адептус Механикус, одна штука. Органические конечности: стандартное количество. Мехадендриты: не превышают норму. Голова..." {n}Клерк, прищурившись, смотрит на Нунцуиса.{/n} "Одна единица сверх необходимого комплекта. Протоколирую с пометкой "рекомендовано к изъятию".

traits.locale_text: "Tech-Priest of the Adeptus Mechanicus, one unit. Organic limbs: standard quantity. Mechadendrites: within normative parameters. Head..." {n}The clerk squints at Nuntius.{/n} "One unit in excess of the required complement. I shall log this with the annotation 'recommended for removal'."

"Tech-Priest of the Adeptus Mechanicus, one unit. Organic limbs: standard quantity. Mechadendrites: within normative parameters. Head..." {n}The clerk squints at Nuntius.{/n} "One unit in excess of the required complement. I shall log this with the annotation 'recommended for removal'."

"A Tech-Priest of the Adeptus Mechanicus, quantity: one. Organic limbs: standard quantity. Mechadendrites: within normative parameters. Head..." {n}The clerk squints at Nuncius.{/n} "One unit in excess of the required complement. I will log this with the annotation 'recommended for removal.'"

"A Tech-Priest of the Adeptus Mechanicus, quantity: one. Organic limbs: standard quantity. Mechadendrites: within normative parameters. Head..." {n}The clerk squints at Nuncius.{/n} "One unit in excess of the required complement. I will log this with the annotation 'recommended for removal.'"

languages.text: "Ein Techpriester des Adeptus Mechanicus, Quantität: 1. Organische Gliedmaßen: Standardmenge. Mechadendriten: Innerhalb normativer Parameter. Kopf ..." {n}Der Beamte schielt zu Nuncius.{/n} "Eine Einheit mehr als erforderlich. Ich werde das Protokoll mit dem Vermerk 'Entfernung empfohlen' versehen."
languages.original_text: "A Tech-Priest of the Adeptus Mechanicus, quantity: one. Organic limbs: standard quantity. Mechadendrites: within normative parameters. Head..." {n}The clerk squints at Nuncius.{/n} "One unit in excess of the required complement. I will log this with the annotation 'recommended for removal.'"

traits.locale_text: "Ein Techpriester des Adeptus Mechanicus, Quantität: 1. Organische Gliedmaßen: Standardmenge. Mechadendriten: Innerhalb normativer Parameter. Kopf ..." {n}Der Beamte schielt zu Nuncius.{/n} "Eine Einheit mehr als erforderlich. Ich werde das Protokoll mit dem Vermerk 'Entfernung empfohlen' versehen."

languages.text: “机械修会技术神甫，一名。有机肢体：标准数量。机械触须：在正常参数范围内。头部……”{n}职员眯起眼睛看向努恩修斯。{/n}“比标准配置多出一个单位。我将记录在案，并标注为‘建议移除’。”
languages.original_text: "A Tech-Priest of the Adeptus Mechanicus, quantity: one. Organic limbs: standard quantity. Mechadendrites: within normative parameters. Head..." {n}The clerk squints at Nuncius.{/n} "One unit in excess of the required complement. I will log this with the annotation 'recommended for removal.'"

traits.locale_text: “机械修会技术神甫，一名。有机肢体：标准数量。机械触须：在正常参数范围内。头部……”{n}职员眯起眼睛看向努恩修斯。{/n}“比标准配置多出一个单位。我将记录在案，并标注为‘建议移除’。”

languages.text: « Technoprêtre de l'Adeptus Mechanicus. Quantité : un. Membres organiques : nombre standard. Mécadendrites : conformes aux paramètres normatifs. Tête... » {n}Le greffier regarde Nuncius en plissant les yeux.{/n} « Une unité excédentaire par rapport au nombre requis. Je vais en prendre note avec le message suivant : Ablation recommandée. »
languages.original_text: "A Tech-Priest of the Adeptus Mechanicus, quantity: one. Organic limbs: standard quantity. Mechadendrites: within normative parameters. Head..." {n}The clerk squints at Nuncius.{/n} "One unit in excess of the required complement. I will log this with the annotation 'recommended for removal.'"

traits.locale_text: « Technoprêtre de l'Adeptus Mechanicus. Quantité : un. Membres organiques : nombre standard. Mécadendrites : conformes aux paramètres normatifs. Tête... » {n}Le greffier regarde Nuncius en plissant les yeux.{/n} « Une unité excédentaire par rapport au nombre requis. Je vais en prendre note avec le message suivant : Ablation recommandée. »

languages.text: «Tecnosacerdote del Adeptus Mechanicus. Cantidad: uno. Miembros orgánicos: cantidad media. Mecadendritas: dentro de los parámetros normativos. Cabeza...». {n}El funcionario escudriña a Nuncius.{/n} «Una unidad por encima de la dotación requerida. Tomaré nota de ello para recomendar su extirpación».
languages.original_text: "A Tech-Priest of the Adeptus Mechanicus, quantity: one. Organic limbs: standard quantity. Mechadendrites: within normative parameters. Head..." {n}The clerk squints at Nuncius.{/n} "One unit in excess of the required complement. I will log this with the annotation 'recommended for removal.'"

traits.locale_text: «Tecnosacerdote del Adeptus Mechanicus. Cantidad: uno. Miembros orgánicos: cantidad media. Mecadendritas: dentro de los parámetros normativos. Cabeza...». {n}El funcionario escudriña a Nuncius.{/n} «Una unidad por encima de la dotación requerida. Tomaré nota de ello para recomendar su extirpación».

languages.text: "Adeptus Mechanicus Tekno Rahibi. Miktar: Bir. Organik uzuvlar: Standart miktar. Mekadentritler: Normatif parametreler dâhilinde. Kafa..." {n}Kâtip Nuncius'a gözlerini kısarak bakıyor.{/n} "Gereken tamamlayıcının üzerinde bir birim. Bunu 'çıkarılması önerilir' notuyla kaydedeceğim."
languages.original_text: "A Tech-Priest of the Adeptus Mechanicus, quantity: one. Organic limbs: standard quantity. Mechadendrites: within normative parameters. Head..." {n}The clerk squints at Nuncius.{/n} "One unit in excess of the required complement. I will log this with the annotation 'recommended for removal.'"

traits.locale_text: "Adeptus Mechanicus Tekno Rahibi. Miktar: Bir. Organik uzuvlar: Standart miktar. Mekadentritler: Normatif parametreler dâhilinde. Kafa..." {n}Kâtip Nuncius'a gözlerini kısarak bakıyor.{/n} "Gereken tamamlayıcının üzerinde bir birim. Bunu 'çıkarılması önerilir' notuyla kaydedeceğim."

languages.text: 「アデプトゥス・メカニクスの技術司祭、数量：一。有機の四肢：標準数量。機械触手：規定パラメータ内。頭部……」{n}事務官はヌンキウスに目を細めた。{/n}「所要数を一つ超過。『撤去推奨』との注記を付けて記録しておく」
languages.original_text: "A Tech-Priest of the Adeptus Mechanicus, quantity: one. Organic limbs: standard quantity. Mechadendrites: within normative parameters. Head..." {n}The clerk squints at Nuncius.{/n} "One unit in excess of the required complement. I will log this with the annotation 'recommended for removal.'"

traits.locale_text: 「アデプトゥス・メカニクスの技術司祭、数量：一。有機の四肢：標準数量。機械触手：規定パラメータ内。頭部……」{n}事務官はヌンキウスに目を細めた。{/n}「所要数を一つ超過。『撤去推奨』との注記を付けて記録しておく」
